{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Underlord step two
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The second step to [[Underlord]] is weaving [[soulfire]] from [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|“Second, you must weave soulfire from aura.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
